name: No witnesses to my slip at work in West Valley, does that kill my claim?

mainEntity.name: No witnesses to my slip at work in West Valley, does that kill my claim?

acceptedAnswer.description: No, medical records, your detailed account, photos, and incident reports suffice; witnesses help but not required.[1][2] Prompt reporting aids credibility.[1] Key factors: Consistent story; doctor notes matching description. Practical guidance: Take photos immediately; log details. Many claims succeed without witnesses.[2] Build case with records.[1]
